text.title: AI Overview Content Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether ai-overview-content-template applies. Root question is a concrete observable; branches name a specific input pattern (`when`) and conclude with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the target query show an AIO panel AND is the post in scope for revision?

branch.when: yes AND introduction lacks the 40-word answer

example.description: When the root condition holds and the first matching branch fires, the tree concludes with the referenced rule id — meaning the methodology applies via that rule. The agent loads the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follows it. When the root condition does not hold, the tree concludes with `skip-methodology`.
